name: Above Par Golf & Entertainment
about: Above Par Golf & Entertainment is a venue offering virtual golf simulation experiences in Leonardtown, MD. It features two state-of-the-art simulators, the Patuxent and Potomac, with the Potomac simulator also supporting multisport activities like soccer, baseball, and archery. The facility provides a range of services including simulator rentals, professional club fittings, golf instruction, and in-house leagues. With on-site PGA instruction and a pro shop for club repairs and custom sets, the venue caters to both casual players and serious golfers looking for practice or entertainment.
why_golfers_like_it: Two high-tech simulators with advanced club and ball tracking
Multisport capabilities including soccer, baseball, and archery
Professional club fittings with major brand partnerships
PGA instruction available for all skill levels
In-house leagues with weekly prizes and flighted play

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs to use with the simulators. The venue does not mention club rentals as part of their simulator service.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of bringing outside food or drinks to Above Par Golf & Entertainment. The venue does not have a kitchen or bar service listed on their website.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify an exact time for playing 18 holes, as simulator time can vary based on player pace and game settings.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Above Par is kid-friendly and offers a special program where kids can trade SOAR tickets from Duke Elementary School for free simulator time, making it a family-oriented venue.
